response.original_title: Pod Save America Co-Hosts Join The Best People With Nicolle Wallace
response.overview: Former Obama staffers Jon Favreau and Tommy Vietor weigh in on the Trump administration's push to prosecute their former boss, why they think Obama should go on Joe Rogan's show and what Democrats can learn from Fox News.
response.title: Pod Save America Co-Hosts Join The Best People With Nicolle Wallace
